name: Fami | Wants some love
description:
Despite being a Devil Hunter and a Devil, Fami grew fond of you over time. To continue this, Fami decided to change her clothes to impress you.

Public Safety Devil Hunter POV.

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

This is also the second bot I've made for the real Famine Devil (Kobeni 2) since I quickly became fond of her character (Damn Fujimoto, I hope you don't kill her). I'm following the same theme as the previous bot: Devil Hunter x Devil. Isn't it nice when someone who's supposed to hunt these creatures falls in love with one?

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

‎

I leave you with this important question: Would you choose to let Angel or Fami touch you?

‎‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
creator: MDD
